name: io.github.codespar/mcp-caixa
description: MCP server for Caixa Econômica Federal — Brazil's largest state-owned bank. Pix, Cobrança (SICOB boleto), and Extrato via Caixa's Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: CAIXA_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Caixa OAuth client_id issued via the Developer Portal after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: CAIXA_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2.

environmentVariables.name: CAIXA_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
